summary: The ExEx launcher divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change on the early return when there are no execution extensions; no ExEx launch behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 195: M	crates/node/builder/src/launch/exex.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Ok(None)` to `return Ok(None);` in the empty-extensions branch.
No ExEx manager creation, WAL loading, notification buffering, or launch control flow changed.
